title: Describe Image: promote the MPI-308 caption harness to a context-menu action on a real queued generation
description:
Promote the MPI-308 dev harness into a real feature. Right-click a gallery card or a history item -> 'Describe image' (video: 'Describe current frame'), run image_descriptor as a NORMAL QUEUED GENERATION (queue card + status-bar progress like any other job), and inject the resulting caption into the prompt box positive field.

WHY THE TRIGGER MOVES: the harness requires an image chip attached to the prompt box. Right-clicking the card you are looking at is the natural gesture and keeps the prompt box clean until the caption actually arrives. The caption STILL lands in the prompt box (same as the harness) — only the trigger changes.

WHAT ALREADY WORKS (MPI-308, shipped + user-verified in-app):
- comfy_workflows/image_descriptor.json — runtime workflow, synced from raw, abliterated Qwen3-VL 4B encoder (commit 0469039d). 18.1s warm.
- runImageDescribe() in js/services/commandExecutor.js — direct-engine runner, BYPASSES generationService.
- 'Describe Image' dev radial item + _describeFirstChip() in js/shell/navigation.js.
- Text capture is a GENERAL contract already (MPI-242): commandExecutor.js title-scoped Output_prompt scan + comfyOutputUrls.js readComfyOutputText.

THE ROOT BLOCKER — now unavoidable:
generationService.js `if (!urls.length)` in exec.onComplete treats a zero-media completion as a CANCELLED generation (emits tool:cancelled + generation:cancelled, ends the activity, fires callbacks.onCancel, returns) and discards promptText read one line earlier. image_descriptor returns TEXT ONLY, zero media. The harness dodged this by bypassing generationService entirely — but this card REQUIRES the queue + progress bar, so it must go THROUGH generationService and the gate must be fixed properly.

PER THE ROOT-CAUSE RULE: do NOT add `if (isCaptionOp) skip` at the gate. That is the symptom patch and will be rejected. The structural fix is an OP-LEVEL DECLARATION that a workflow returns text rather than media (e.g. `outputKind: 'text'` on the op in commandRegistry.js, defaulting to 'media' when absent), so completion branches on a declared contract instead of on an empty array. Keep the empty-array check for its real job: detecting genuinely empty completions and post-Stop terminals. Sweep every consumer of the new declaration in one pass.

RECON ALREADY DONE (2026-07-19, verified in source — re-verify anchors before relying on them, concurrent sessions edit these files):
- Context menus: MpiGalleryGrid.js (~line 1107 items array, ~1090 contextmenu listener) and MpiHistoryList.js (~line 229 items array, ~214 listener). SHARED renderer MpiContextMenu.show(), but the ITEMS ARRAYS ARE SEPARATE — the entry must be added TWICE.
- Item shape to copy: { key: 'compare', icon: 'compare', label: 'Compare', disabled: compareDisabled }
- onSelect receives ONLY `key` — never the item. Gallery reconstructs from _groups by id and emits to the parent block; History emits indices and MpiGroupHistoryBlock resolves _group.history[idx]. filePath is reached in the PARENT block, not in onSelect.
- Media-type conditionals already exist: MpiHistoryList uses `_isVideo` to push 'Combine' (video-only) and omit 'Download mask'. Copy that pattern for the video variant.
- Video current frame: captureFrameBlob() in js/utils/video.js returns { blob, dataUrl }; exposed as viewer.el.captureSnapshot() in MpiVideoViewer. NOTE frame-accuracy caveat — MPI-287 covers exact-last-frame capture via frameSink; for 'current frame' captureSnapshot is likely fine, but the blob must be written to a real path first because MpiLoadImageFromPath reads an OS PATH, not a blob (memory feedback_media_injection_path_to_string).
- Prompt box write: el.injectPrompts({ positive }) — direct call, or Events.emit('workspace:inject-prompts', { positive }). NOTE it always sets positiveValue but only repaints the textarea when NOT in negative mode.
- Chip/card path -> OS path: extractAbsPath() in js/utils/mediaActions.js.

WHAT NEEDS NO WORK (verified):
- StatusBar: needs NO changes. It shows a short label ('Describing image'), progress, and tool:idle — exactly like any other op. It CANNOT display the caption text itself (single short label element); the caption goes to the prompt box, not the status bar.
- progressStages: NO entry needed. A text-only workflow emits zero tqdm bars; stagesFor returns 0 and the counter simply omits the /M denominator.
- Queue panel: already degrades gracefully — _renderThumb falls through to an empty frame labelled 'TEXT' when there is no image/video, and previewUrl stays null with no latent previews.

STEPS:
1. Op-level text-output declaration + fix the generationService completion gate (THE REAL WORK). Sweep all consumers.
2. Register the op (commandRegistry.js, universal_workflows.js already has imageDescribe, operationRegistry.js, operation_registry.json — see docs/playbooks/add-app/01-descriptor-and-ops.md; NEVER regenerate operation_registry.json, it strips universal flags).
3. Context-menu entry in BOTH MpiGalleryGrid.js and MpiHistoryList.js; video variant gated on _isVideo.
4. Wire each parent block's handler: resolve filePath -> abs path -> enqueue via generationService -> on completion inject into the prompt box.
5. Video: capture current frame to a real file path before injection.
6. Retire or keep the dev radial harness (decide — it is dev-gated and harmless, but it duplicates the path).

OPEN QUESTION CARRIED FROM MPI-308 (still unanswered, and the reason all of this exists): does caption->upscale actually beat re-using the user's thin original prompt? The harness now makes this testable. Answer it BEFORE investing in this card, so the feature is justified by a result rather than an assumption.

SCOPE NOTE: storing the caption on the item (sidecar) and auto-feeding it to an upscale pass are DELIBERATELY OUT of this card. This card only moves the trigger and puts the job on the queue.

events.note: Split out of MPI-308: the dev harness is shipped and verified, this card promotes it to a context-menu action on a real queued generation. Forces the text-only completion contract that MPI-308 deliberately bypassed.
